text: The darkness presses in all around me, shrouding the space in uncertainty. It's hard to see what is before me, and with just faint red glows to guide my way, I feel a quiet mix of curiosity and unease. I am compelled to listen more keenly, to sense the subtleties that light usually reveals. Here, the unseen becomes profound, and my mind wanders in contemplation of shadows and the mysteries they hold.
